description_long: This is a modern, rectangular hostel building with three stories, featuring a flat roof and a minimalist facade. The front side displays a series of large, vertically oriented windows and several entry doors, each with small landscaped planters in front. The rear facade is characterized by wide sliding glass doors on the ground floor, opening onto private patio areas, and additional windows on the upper floors. The side views reveal the building's depth, with enclosed courtyards and small green spaces adjacent to the structure. The exterior is predominantly white, with subtle accents in black and beige, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and geometric simplicity. The building sits on a broad, flat base, suggesting integration with an urban sidewalk or street.
description: A modern, three-story white hostel with large windows, flat roof, and landscaped entryways. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and geometric forms.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrances, vertical windows, and landscaped planters along the facade.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the building's depth, enclosed courtyards, and the flat roofline.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting wide sliding glass doors, private patios, and additional windows on upper floors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible green spaces and the building's rectangular profile.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrances are located on the front facade, each marked by a black door set within a white wall, flanked by rectangular planters. The doors are standard-sized, rectangular, and flush with the facade, with no visible steps, ramps, or canopies.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are large, vertically oriented rectangles arranged in a regular, symmetrical pattern across all facades. The front and rear have multiple windows per floor, with the rear also featuring wide sliding glass doors on the ground level. Window frames are minimal and blend with the modern aesthetic.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary with minimalist and modernist influences, characterized by clean lines, flat roof, and geometric forms.
